title: Geochron World Clock Configuration
description: Configuration for the Geochron World Clock plugin - a real-time world map showing the day/night terminator, subsolar point, city markers, and a digital clock.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Geochron World Clock plugin

display_duration.title: Seconds per Display
display_duration.description: How long to show the Geochron before rotating to the next plugin

update_interval.title: Update Interval (seconds)
update_interval.description: How often to recompute the sun position and re-render the map. The terminator drifts slowly, so this can be infrequent.

timezone.title: Local Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'America/New_York') used for the local time readout and to auto-derive the map center longitude on square/tall panels. Leave null to inherit the LEDMatrix global timezone.

map_center_longitude.title: Map Center Longitude
map_center_longitude.description: Longitude to center the map on for square/tall panels that can't show the full 360 degrees. Leave null to auto-derive from the local timezone's UTC offset.

show_terminator_bands.title: Show Twilight Bands
show_terminator_bands.description: Show smooth civil/nautical/astronomical twilight gradient bands at the day/night terminator. When off, the terminator is a hard day/night line.

night_brightness.title: Night Side Brightness
night_brightness.description: Brightness multiplier applied to the map on the night side (1.0 = no darkening)

show_grid.title: Show Lat/Lon Grid
show_grid.description: Draw a latitude/longitude graticule over the map

graticule_step_deg.title: Grid Spacing (degrees)
graticule_step_deg.description: Spacing between graticule lines, in degrees of latitude/longitude

show_sun_marker.title: Show Sun Marker
show_sun_marker.description: Draw a marker at the subsolar point (where the sun is directly overhead)

show_cities.title: Show City Markers
show_cities.description: Draw markers for the configured cities

cities.title: City Markers
cities.description: Cities to mark on the map. Each is plotted as a dot; labels and local times are shown when space allows.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone name for this city's local time

show_digital_clock.title: Show Digital Clock
show_digital_clock.description: Show a digital UTC/local time readout

show_seconds.title: Show Seconds
show_seconds.description: Show seconds in the digital clock readout

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: Color palette for the map and overlays

ocean_color.title: Ocean Color
ocean_color.description: RGB color for ocean/water [R, G, B]

land_color.title: Land Color
land_color.description: RGB color for land masses [R, G, B]

coastline_color.title: Coastline Color
coastline_color.description: RGB color for coastlines and country borders [R, G, B]

night_tint_color.title: Night Tint Color
night_tint_color.description: Color the night side of the map is tinted toward [R, G, B]

sun_marker_color.title: Sun Marker Color
sun_marker_color.description: RGB color for the subsolar point marker [R, G, B]

city_marker_color.title: City Marker Color
city_marker_color.description: RGB color for city marker dots [R, G, B]

grid_color.title: Grid Color
grid_color.description: RGB color for the lat/lon graticule [R, G, B]

text_primary_color.title: Primary Text Color
text_primary_color.description: RGB color for primary text (clock, headings) [R, G, B]

text_secondary_color.title: Secondary Text Color
text_secondary_color.description: RGB color for secondary text (dates, labels) [R, G, B]
